row.technologyDescription: Provides standardized evaluation for OOD detection under near/far shifts and nuisance factors.
row.task: Analyze validation test data to determine whether systems or processes have met validation criteria or identify root causes.
row.capability: detect input data outside training distributions
row.idea: Validation Engineers can integrate OpenOOD v1.5 into the post-deployment analysis pipeline...
row.fitRationale: This directly addresses root cause analysis by flagging OOD production data.
